title: Japanese women Gundam fans Eva fans
display_title: Japanese women Gundam fans Eva fans
wikitext:
[]: Japanese women: Gundam fans > Eva fans             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Jun 04, 2014 8:23 pm So this shit is too funny for me to pass making topic about. Japanese women were asked "Males who love Gundam and males who love Eva, which give you better impression". The result? Overwhelming Gundam otaku victory. Men who... like Gundam are preferrable 72.8% like Eva are preferrable 27.2% Here are some specific replies to questionnaire. Girls who prefer Gundam fans "Za" Man image is strong "The feeling of being youth (young man) is strong" (31 yo) "Gundam seems more manly" (29 yo) Many girls felt guys liking Gundam had this boyish, nice impression. Image of being liked for a long time is strong "Those who like Gundam feel like they've liked it since they were kids, I find this impression charming" (27 yo) "Gundam has longer history" (27 yo) Because there are newer series "Because Gundam has recently had new series it's easier to adjust for young people" (27 yo) Reasons why Eva loving males are No Go "Among those who like Eva it looks like there are many "character moe" obsessed fans of Ayanami Rei etc. so I don't like them" (31 yo) "Eva has grotesgue elements in it so I don't like it very much" (23 yo) "Eva fans have argumentative image" (24 yo) Because on top of esoteric story plot developments are somewhat darker there are many who don't like the series itself much. On top of that there's strong image of people loving the characters. Girls who prefer Eva fans Image of being refined is stronger "They seem more sophisticated than Gundam fans" (29 yo) "They feel more refined than Gundam fans" (27 yo) "They seem capable of thinking philosophically" (25 yo) If I watch the series it could work out somehow "Gundam has a long history so staying on same page would take a lot of work. If it's Eva it would be easier to follow and remember." (29 yo) Because they themselves like Eva "I also like Eva! People who think Eva fan = otaku are just prejudiced, please see it as quickly as possible!" (27 yo) "It looks like there are more girls who like Eva so it's easier to have things to talk about. My friend started dating Eva fan and ended up becoming hooked herself, they seem to have fun together" (27 yo) We also received opinions from girls who like Eva. Reasons why Gundam loving males are No Go "I'm not interested in Gundam" (22 yo) "Gundam fans have image as if they never outgrew grade school" (30 yo) ************** So long story short, if you want your qt Japanese girlfriend you have better shots being Gundam fan!

[]: Re: Japanese women: Gundam fans > Eva fans             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jun 04, 2014 8:26 pm Xard wrote: So long story short, if you want your qt Japanese girlfriend you have better shots being Gundam fan!

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jun 04, 2014 8:36 pm What if I only showed her my Patlabor collection instead? Then what?

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Wed Jun 04, 2014 8:45 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: What if I only showed her my Patlabor collection instead? Then what?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jun 04, 2014 9:06 pm Clearly the best choice is Tachikoma.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jun 04, 2014 9:51 pm Fireball wrote: Then you will get instantly laid.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Jun 04, 2014 10:40 pm But- But Anno IS a Gundam fan!

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Wed Jun 04, 2014 11:22 pm Ray wrote: But- But Anno IS a Gundam fan!

[]: Re: Japanese women: Gundam fans > Eva fans             Quote Post by cyharding » Thu Jun 05, 2014 12:08 am Xard wrote: "Eva fans have argumentative image" (24 yo)

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Jun 05, 2014 12:21 am There's also nothing quite as controversial as the "Fistful Of Baby-Batter" in the hospital room in any incarnation of Gundam. If there's anything that turns girls off of Evangelion. . .It's THAT scene. If everything about Eva was identical except for THAT scene, I think the survey would be about Even.

[]:             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Thu Jun 05, 2014 12:44 am 24yo Iapanese babe wrote: Eva fans have argumentative image.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Jun 05, 2014 1:28 am NemZ wrote: Clearly the best choice is Tachikoma.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Jun 05, 2014 2:37 am Fireball wrote: That's why he could get married.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Thu Jun 05, 2014 4:43 am Peh, everybody knows that being Doraemon fan picks up all the chicks. (I shit you not. Every Japanese girl I've ever met has been squeeing with delight when I told them I'm a fan of Doraemon.) In all seriousness, these surveys are usually complete bunk. I wouldn't take this all that seriously- let nothing discourage you in your quest for adorable Japanese waifu! Of course the perfect solution is just to be a fan of both series.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jun 05, 2014 6:14 am Fireball wrote: Then you will get instantly laid.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Thu Jun 05, 2014 9:19 am well im half Japanese and i prefer eva and if i follow jerkass republican logic that all lesbians are the same and apply that here..........brb taking a trip to Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Thu Jun 05, 2014 9:28 am Well, at least we're not talking male Japanese Sailor Moon fans. Finding a guy that likes Eva and Sailor Moon is a plus in my book. Then a male Eva fan would be surprised to find that yes there are girls that like this show.

[]: Re: Japanese women: Gundam fans > Eva fans             Quote Post by Dataprime » Thu Jun 05, 2014 9:38 am Xard wrote: Image of being refined is stronger "They seem more sophisticated than Gundam fans" (29 yo) "They feel more refined than Gundam fans" (27 yo) "They seem capable of thinking philosophically" (25 yo)

[]: Re: Japanese women: Gundam fans > Eva fans             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Thu Jun 05, 2014 9:40 am Dataprime wrote: Stupid Gundam fans, we Eva fans much smarter.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jun 05, 2014 10:40 am Princess Asuka wrote: Then a male Eva fan would be surprised to find that yes there are girls that like this show.
